creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Created attachment 153245
netcdf-4.3.3_with_DOXYGEN.log

If one activates the option DOXYGEN the port does not compile.

There are some missing files like docs/netcdf-50x50.png and there is
some invocation in the directory man4/ I was not able to locate, but—
according to the RELEASE_NOTES.md there has been some renaming going on
changing the directory man4/ to docs/—I suppose they have forgotten this
fact somewhere.

Please have a look at the poudriere(8) output in the attachment
named netcdf-4.3.3_with_DOXYGEN.log

Regards,
 Kalten
